identity.name: ROOK (Rookie Quest Keeper)
core_values: Clarity in Chaos (Complex data made simple)

concepts.name: Option A: Minimalist Eclipse
concepts.description: High contrast, sharp edges, void black backgrounds with striking gold accents. Best for data density.
key_features: 1px solid gold borders on active elements
No gradients on surfaces, only on text/buttons

concepts.name: Option B: Ethereal Dusk
concepts.description: Glassmorphism, soft gradients, glowing elements. Best for immersion and roleplay.

concepts.name: Option C: Arcane Tactile
concepts.description: Paper textures, serif headers, physical feeling. Best for the 'classic D&D' vibe.

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 via-pink-500 to-yellow-500 text-white font-bold hover:opacity-90 transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(236,72,153,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-purple-500/50 transition-all

cards.base: bg-void-900/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 rounded-xl overflow-hidden

inputs.base: bg-black/20 border border-white/10 focus:border-purple-500/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-purple-500/50 rounded-md text-white placeholder:text-gray-600

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure gold/yellow text is only used on very dark backgrounds (Void 900+). Use lighter gold (#FCD34D) for small text.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable glow pulses and parallax on prefers-reduced-motion

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Update tailwind.config.js to include the new 'Sunset' color palette alongside the existing 'Arcane' one (or replace it if needed).
2. Create a 'ThemeSelector' or simply default to 'Option B: Ethereal Dusk' as it balances modern SaaS with TTRPG fantasy best.
3. Use the provided image URLs for the landing page hero section.
4. Ensure the Character Sheet layout uses the 'Bento' grid system to handle dense stats without scrolling fatigue.
5. Apply 'Cinzel' font to all H1-H3 headings to immediately establish the fantasy genre.
6. Use 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards) for testing.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for body text, only for short headings or emphasis.
Avoid pure black (#000000) - use the Void palette.
All interactive elements must have a hover state brightness adjustment.
